title: Live staged orchestrator mock-spine compatibility skip
problem: Live staged orchestrator runs fail at link-concepts with 'No accepted claims' when fetched publisher HTML lacks checksum-pinned mock fixture marker phrases. Operators need a clean skip instead of a misleading spine error.
evidence: Option B operator run: link-concepts failed after live fetch returned paywall HTML stub
acceptance_criteria: Live orchestrator skips with status skipped and reason unsuitable_live_artifact when fetch succeeds but artifact lacks mock-spine markers.
Compatible artifacts still proceed through the mock spine path.
Mock-only pytest proves skip and compatibility paths without network.
non_goals: Live Ollama extraction on arbitrary fetched text (ticket-368).
Changing layer-3 proof skip semantics in existing live_network tests.
rollback_plan: Revert staged_spine_compatibility checks; restore link-concepts fail-fast on incompatible live HTML.
